column2: This beautiful crown may only be made of paper, but its bright colours improve the mood of everyone around you
This delicious slice of cake is practically begging to be eaten...
This strange artifact from a distant land is said to produce thunder and colourful projectiles when used. Sounds like a perfect way to bless the troops!

During a recent military parade, [edmp_celeb_decision_taker.GetBestName] (username: [edmp_celeb_decision_taker.GetHumanName]) surprised me with a strange artifact, which exploded with a thunderous sound and colourful projectiles.\nMy troops viewed this as a significant blessing, and will be inspired for years to come.
My §Yrealm levies§! will be §Grefilled§! via event in §Y45 days' time§!
Following the recent parade, warriors throughout my realm have flocked to my banner!
